# Copilot Instructions

Use English only in this repository.

Rules:
- Write all identifiers (class names, method names, variables, constants) in English.
- Write all code comments and TODO notes in English.
- Write all documentation (README updates, JavaDoc, markdown notes) in English.
- Write user-facing literals in English unless localization is explicitly requested.
- When refactoring existing code, translate legacy non-English identifiers and comments to English when safe.
